author: okezue
name: Non-record: Post-Quantization LoRA Distillation (LCQ) on PR #1855 stack, val_bpb=1.06767
blurb: Novel technique exploration: a small LoRA module is trained on the post-GPTQ dequantized model via KL distillation against the pre-quant BF16 teacher, on TRAIN data only (no val). The trained LoRA is held in memory across train-to-eval and applied via forward_ttt with cu_seqlens-aware variable-length attention during sliding-window scoring. Single-seed result, documented as a non-record submission with negative-result analysis.
technique_summary: PR #1855 SOTA stack base + train-time post-quant LoRA KL distillation (rank=4, alpha=4, 60s, train data, BF16 teacher) + sliding-window stride-64 eval with the trained LoRA dispatched through cu_seqlens-aware forward_ttt.
